mapper.select:
SELECT m.maintenance_id AS maintenanceId, m.vin, m.maintenance_type AS serviceType, m.service_date AS serviceDate, m.mileage, m.cost, m.notes
FROM "Maintenance" m
JOIN "Vehicles" v ON m.vin = v.vin
WHERE v.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO "Maintenance" ( vin, maintenance_type, service_date, mileage, cost, notes )
VALUES ( #{vin}, #{serviceType}, #{serviceDate}, #{mileage}, #{cost}, #{notes} )
